reference: This type of pain can occur due to sudden movement of the neck. This causes muscle sprains and muscle tightness, to the extent that even the slightest movement becomes painful. I would like to suggest you use diclofenac gel and also a muscle relaxant like Myoril or Myospaz. Local heat application also works. Do not use a heavy pillow.
text: This type of pain can occur due to sudden movement of the neck. This causes muscle sprains and muscle tightness to the extent that even the slightest movement becomes painful. I would like to suggest you use diclofenac gel and also a muscle relaxant like Myoril or Myospaz. Local heat application also works. Do not use a heavy pillow.
